ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "jmi_reg_no" TEXT /* JMI Registration number of the applicant */,
  "jeeroll" TEXT /* Entrance exam roll number */,
  "jeemarks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained in the entrance exam */,
  "jeerank" INTEGER /* Rank assigned based on the marks */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "pref1" TEXT /* First preference for course allocation */,
  "pref2" TEXT /* Second preference for course allocation */,
  "pref3" TEXT /* Third preference for course allocation */,
  "pref4" TEXT /* Fourth preference for course allocation */,
  "pref5" TEXT /* Fifth preference for course allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees for the course */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course allocated */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank assigned to the applicant based on exam performance */,
  "exam_year" INTEGER /* Year of the entrance exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, admission officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_centers" (
  "exam_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exam center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the exam center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "exam_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam result record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "exam_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exam center ID */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the applicant in the entrance exam */,
  "exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the entrance exam */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_center_id") REFERENCES exam_centers ("exam_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_allocation_history" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course allocation record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course ID */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of course allocation */,
  "allocated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who allocated the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_allocation_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_allocation_history_allocated_by FOREIGN KEY ("allocated_by") REFERENCES administrators ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_allocation_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., admission trends, course preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report ID */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant's ID */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course ID */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the applicant */,
  "marks" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
